configurations.name: Build prod appbundle -> Downloads
configurations.command: cd client && set -euo pipefail && flutter build appbundle --release --flavor prod --dart-define-from-file=../.config.prod.json && VERSION_LINE=$(grep '^version:' pubspec.yaml | head -n1 | awk '{print $2}') && APP_VERSION=${VERSION_LINE%%+*} && BUILD_NUMBER=${VERSION_LINE##*+} && OUT_NAME="asset_tuner-${APP_VERSION}+${BUILD_NUMBER}.aab" && SRC="build/app/outputs/bundle/prodRelease/app-prod-release.aab" && DEST="$HOME/Downloads/$OUT_NAME" && cp "$SRC" "$DEST" && echo "Copied: $DEST"
